ablation.destroyed_structure: the self-organizing coupling (COUPL_OFF), temporal correlation (SHUFFLE), medium-match (different_medium_screen), adaptation (NOADAPT), or drive (free_run) that the syntropy/phase-conjugation claim depends on
ablation.expected_direction: if the claim held, the intact QA operator would exceed its ablated control and show medium-specificity; observed: it does not for the emergent dynamics

decision_rules.accept_criterion: Intact QA operator's metric significantly exceeds its ablated control AND shows medium-specificity.
decision_rules.reject_criterion: Metric within the control/null range, or specificity absent.

hypothesis: QA's self-organizing (emergent) dynamics implement optical-phase-conjugation-style syntropic distortion correction / coherence extraction.

null_model.description: Multiple surrogates, one per sub-experiment, each destroying exactly the structure the claim attributes value to.
null_model.generating_process: Size-matched random partition of occupied lattice cells; time-shuffle of the driving signal; re-randomized distorting phase screen; coupling set to zero; and free-running (zero-drive) baselines.
null_model.independence_argument: Each surrogate acts on a single axis (partition assignment, temporal ordering, medium identity, or coupling on/off) while preserving the declared observer projection and the signal marginal.

observer_projection.description: Continuous chaotic/coherent/noise signals (Lorenz, Rossler, logistic, sines, white/red noise) enter the QA layer only via quantization to phase bins in {1,...,m} or injection into the QASystem b-state; boundary crossed exactly twice (Theorem NT).

source_mapping.mapping_rationale: Negative-result companion battery for cert [518]; documents that emergent QA dynamics do not implement phase-conjugate syntropy, motivating the explicit four-wave-mixing operator.
